title: celmisia pellita
intro: Celmisia pellita is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the daisy family. It is native to New Zealand and is often referred to as the "Tree Daisy" due to its large, daisy-like flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. Celmisia pellita can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its potential health benefits.
